title: Trident Seafoods plant in Petersburg has a buyer: Ketchikan-based E.C. Phillips & Son
summary: On the morning of Friday, March 15, a Trident Seafoods employee removed the company’s signs from its downtown processing facility. title: SSBCI March 2024 Update
summary: What an impact! The Alaska SSBCI program has worked with First National Bank Alaska, Northrim Bank, Business Impact NW, and Cook Inlet Lending Center to distribute $32 million in loans to 46 Alaskan businesses across 20 communities . title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: March 15, 2024
summary: March 15, 2024: The sea ice has increased this week at a greater growth rate of 1.28% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 0.01%), from the level on 03/07/2024 of 14.784 M km 2 to 14.976 M km 2 for this week. title: Alaska SBDC will be closed Friday, March 15
summary: The Alaska SBDC will be closed on Friday, March 15, 2024, in alignment with the University of Alaska Anchorage’s (UAA) observance of the Spring Recess (Break) holiday.
